messages.content:
Bot1 <Event>: I have picked up:
- 1 Stone Sword
- 1 Bow
- 24 Arrow
- 1 Leather Tunic
- 12 Bread
- 40 Oak Planks

arguments.message: I have picked up: 1 Stone Sword, 1 Bow, 24 Arrows, 1 Leather Tunic, 12 Bread, 40 Oak Planks.

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "I have picked up: 1 Stone Sword, 1 Bow, 24 Arrows, 1 Leather Tunic, 12 Bread, 40 Oak Planks."

Bot2 <MESSAGE>: Good work on the loot. We have 40 Oak Planks and a stone sword. Let's build a defensive wall at X1 Y0 Z1 immediately before hostiles spawn. I'll help gather materials and start construction.

arguments.name: build_defensive_wall
arguments.description: Build defensive wall at position X1 Y0 Z1 with height 2 using oak_planks

messages.content: Me <NEW ACTION>: Created build_defensive_wall and executed it with {"position":{"x":1,"y":0,"z":1},"length":3,"height":2,"material":"oak_planks"}. <BUILT_WALL>: Placed 6/6 blocks for 3x2 defensive wall using oak_planks

- zombie id 15 is 3.3 blocks away
- zombie id 16 is 4.4 blocks away

I used or lost:
- 6 Oak Planks

arguments.message: Hostiles approaching! Zombie id 15 at 3.3 blocks, zombie id 16 at 4.4 blocks. I'll take them down with my bow while Bot2 holds the wall.

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "Hostiles approaching! Zombie id 15 at 3.3 blocks, zombie id 16 at 4.4 blocks. I'll take them down with my bow while Bot2 holds the wall."
